#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events')

## RehydrationResult Class

Result of aggregate state rehydration, separating snapshot state from tail events\.
EventStore is schema\-ignorant: it cannot apply tail events to snapshot state\.
Only the domain service knows its own state shape and can project events onto it\.

```csharp
public record RehydrationResult : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.RehydrationResult>
```

## RehydrationResult\(object, List\<EventEnvelope\>, long, long\) Constructor

Result of aggregate state rehydration, separating snapshot state from tail events\.
EventStore is schema\-ignorant: it cannot apply tail events to snapshot state\.
Only the domain service knows its own state shape and can project events onto it\.

```csharp
public RehydrationResult(object? SnapshotState, System.Collections.Generic.List<Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.EventEnvelope> Events, long LastSnapshotSequence, long CurrentSequence);
```
